examples: The first development in modern transportation was the steamship.
You might hope that the columnists of this article can leisurely cross the Panama Canal by steamship.
The steamship veered around for the port.
In 1858, the Great Eastern steamship, built by Isambard Kingdom Brunel, was launched at Millwall, London.
Back in the days before they really had airplanes the players would travel by steamship.
